title: Analytics Tracking Spec
description: JSON Schema for analytics tracking spec YAML files. Encodes the same rules as conventions.yaml. Used by IDEs (VS Code YAML extension) for inline validation.

spec_id.description: Unique spec identifier. Format: SPEC-NNN (e.g. SPEC-001)

spec_version.description: Semantic version of this spec. Bump minor for new params, major for renamed/removed events.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Only 'approved' specs are implemented by engineers.

feature_brief.description: Reference to the feature brief this spec implements. Format: FB-NNN

owner.description: Team or person accountable for this spec.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date when this spec was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date of the last modification.

events.description: Array of event definitions. Must contain at least one event.

name.description: GA4 event name in snake_case. Must match the approved allowlist in conventions.yaml.

trigger.description: Plain English description of exactly when this event fires. Must be precise enough for an engineer to implement without asking questions. Always tie to an API response or a confirmed state — never to a raw user click.

priority.description: P0 = blocks launch. P1 = must ship within sprint. P2 = nice to have.

notes.description: Edge cases, deduplication logic, PII handling, SPA routing notes. Anything that doesn't fit in the trigger.

parameters.description: Parameters sent with this event. Can be an empty array [] if the event carries no parameters beyond automatic ones.

parameter.description: A single parameter within an event.

name.description: Parameter name in snake_case. No reserved prefixes (ga_, gtm_, ep.).

type.description: Data type. Use 'number' for all numeric values (GA4 does not distinguish int from float). Use 'enum' when values are constrained to a fixed set — must include a 'values' list.

required.description: Whether this parameter is required for the event to be considered valid. Required params missing in production data will trigger a monitoring alert.

example.description: A concrete, realistic example value. Must not be a placeholder (TODO, TBD, null, empty string).

values.description: Required when type is 'enum'. Lists all valid values for this parameter.

currency_param.description: Required when type is 'currency'. Names the sibling parameter that carries the ISO 4217 currency code.
